description: Validates that promoted research-analyst subagent loads SKILL.md and applies the correct methodology. Tests anti-sycophancy protocol and source hierarchy from ds-analyze:research skill.
input_prompt: use research-analyst to analyze the TAM for enterprise AI coding assistants
notes: Claude invokes the research-analyst subagent which loads SKILL.md from ds-analyze:research. Response applies the structured methodology: states a research question, identifies assumptions, applies source hierarchy (Tier 1/2/3), searches for disconfirming evidence first, requires bottoms-up TAM reconciliation, and labels findings with confidence levels.
